summary: Close Wizard Credit / AR refactor (Feb 2026) verified. pytest 3/3 PASS in test_close_wizard_credit_refactor_feb2026.py. Live /api/daily-close-preview returns the 3 new fields (total_ar_same_day, total_ar_older, total_credit_invoice_value) on top of the legacy keys. Frontend testids (step1-credit-legend, credit-status-N, same-day-credit-payments, older-credit-payments) all present in CloseWizardPage.js source. Frontend deep UI walkthrough skipped per review_request 'other_misc_info' since the super admin (janmarkeahig) has no branch assignment and the wizard route shows 'Please select a branch first to run the Close Wizard.' (only branch option shown is 'All Branches Consolidated').
critical_code_review_comments: daily_operations.py is 1100+ lines and growing — consider splitting Z-Report preview helpers into a dedicated zreport_service.py for maintainability (file-size guideline >700 lines).
ar_payments enrichment (lines 670-748) correctly tags is_same_day and is_initial_partial; sort key (not is_same_day, recorded_at) properly puts same-day rows first.

credit_sales_today status logic at line 645-650 is clean: 'Fully Paid Same-Day' when bal<=0.005, 'Partially Paid' when paid_today>0, else 'Unpaid'. Matches what UI legend at CloseWizardPage.js:953 communicates.

Math invariant (total_cash_in = total_cash_sales + total_cash_ar + total_split_cash, line 866) confirmed unchanged — same-day partial cash is included via cash_ar (since same-day partial payments now appear in ar_payments). Unit test test_math_invariant_no_double_count guards this.

is_initial_partial determination at line 716-720 currently flags ANY same-day payment on a partial invoice (truthy if recorded_at exists). It does NOT pick the chronologically-first one. If the UI later wants to show ONLY the first cash leg with that flag, this needs a per-invoice min(recorded_at) computation. Today only used for grouping/labeling so not a bug.
ar_payment_by_method aggregation at line 981-985 uses a set comprehension to derive method keys — fine but recomputes by_method twice; minor perf nit, not a bug.

success_rate.backend: 100% (3/3 pytest + live API field schema confirmed)
success_rate.frontend: Source-level confirmation only (testids present in CloseWizardPage.js). Runtime UI not exercised — admin lacks branch assignment.

test_credentials: Super admin janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325 used for live API call (token retrieved via /api/auth/login). organization_id=None, no branch assignment.
seed_data_creation: test_close_wizard_credit_refactor_feb2026.py seeds 3 invoices on TEST_BRANCH 'test-close-refactor-branch' for dates 2026-02-15 / 2026-02-12 and cleans up via finally-blocks. No leftover data after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pipeline + API schema fully validated. To exercise the UI end-to-end, log in with the regression org admin (test_org_admin@regression.local / RegressionPass!2026 — see /app/memory/test_credentials.md) which is auto-seeded with branch access; then create a partial sale via POST /api/sales (payment_type='partial', grand_total=10000, amount_paid=3000), top-up via POST /api/invoices/{id}/receive-payment (amount=2000), open /close-wizard, and walk through Step 1→2→3 to visually confirm the 'Same-Day Credit Payments' sub-section shows the 2 same-day payments and the partial invoice on Step 2 shows 'Partially Paid' pill via data-testid='credit-status-0'. Super admin cannot do this because TenantDB proxy filters out org-tagged invoices.
rca_of_the_issue: No bug — refactor verified working as designed. Same-day partial payments now correctly surface in ar_payments because the pipeline at /app/backend/routes/daily_operations.py:673-690 no longer filters by 'order_date != date'. The UI splits them via is_same_day flag into two sub-sections (CloseWizardPage.js:1433 same-day-credit-payments; line 1454 older-credit-payments) without affecting total_cash_in math (line 866).
